channel.title: Homelab Github on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Homelab Github on simeononsecurity

item.title: Building an IT Home Lab in 2026: Your Portfolio Is Your Career
item.category: "IT homelab 2026" , "building an IT home lab" , "homelab career" , "IT portfolio homelab" , "Proxmox homelab" , "homelab for job seekers" , "IT lab setup" , "homelab documentation career" , "homelab github" , "IT career proof of work"
item.description: In 2026, a well-documented IT homelab is the most important thing you can build for your career. Certifications are checkboxes. Your homelab proves you can actually do the work.
